บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า26_pipe_type_schedule.json
warnings: This is a dense 4-column x ~14-row legend table with many small glyph-based symbols (valve types, cleanout variants, fitting marks). Symbol meanings (right-hand Thai text) are read with reasonable confidence, but the exact graphic glyph for each symbol (left column) is approximate/described rather than transcribed as precise vector shapes -- treat 'symbol' field as a description aid, not a precise glyph spec.

A few adjacent rows for FD./FCO./AVC. appear to show near-duplicate variants distinguished only by a small graphic difference (e.g. side-outlet vs standard) that is hard to distinguish confidently at this resolution.
